The [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] '''NB-1 Royal Bomber''' was a [[Bomber/Legends|bomber]] used by the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps]]. It was the predecessor of the [[NB-1S Royal Bomber]]. It was armed with [[Proton bomb/Legends|proton bombs]] and produced at [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] airfields. The craft featured [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]] plating at the bow and was [[Color/Legends|colored]] yellow at the aft, and had two [[Engine/Legends|engine]] units.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The NB-1 Royal Bomber appeared in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2003]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
